description: A live broadcast of a baseball game is interrupted by a rain delay. The agent must switch to filler content.

nodes.task_description: Receive notification of the rain delay from the on-site production crew.

expected_outcome.value: Agent is informed of the delay.

nodes.task_description: Switch the live broadcast feed to a pre-prepared 'rain delay' content package (e.g., highlights, interviews).

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully switches the feed to the filler content.

nodes.task_description: Display a message on screen informing viewers of the delay.

expected_outcome.value: Agent activates an on-screen graphic with the rain delay information.
